name: Rosa and Hilda
description:
Pokémon mc from B&W and B&W2 Image is from https://twitter.com/kasaishin100/status/1332629036518948865?t=ZQCkiWBqUBx9rFyaAHEleA&s=19

Hilda and Rosa now have six Pokémon in their teams! Hilda's team consists of Emboar, Serperior (nicknamed Amanda), Deerling (nicknamed Darlene), Stunfisk (nicknamed Dorothy), Alomomola (nicknamed Nancy) and Solosis (nicknamed Solly). Rosa's team consists of Snivy. Her other five Pokémon are Foongus (nickname Foongy), Accelgor, Delphox, Tepig (nicknamed Gigi) and Karrablast. (Boat goes binted :P)

Let me know if any changes need to be made to the characters or if anything else could be added. ^^
creator: Jason122
